name: Redox Limited
analysis: RDX has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$3.8000. Trade idea: entry A$4.0700, stop A$3.2274, target A$6.5978 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
